name: GEO Panorama Audit
description_en: Runs a full-brand GEO baseline audit by crawling the brand's official site, cross-verifying claims against public sources, and producing a 12-domain diagnosis with an onsite/offsite opportunity map and priorities, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
description_zh: 通过抓取品牌官网、用公开信源交叉核验断言，做一次全品牌 GEO 基线诊断，产出 12 个诊断域的报告、站内/站外机会地图与优先级，交付 Word、PDF、HTML、Markdown 四格式。
long_en: Establishes a brand's GEO baseline so content is discoverable and citable by AI answer engines, with evidence-backed onsite and offsite action plans.
long_zh: 为品牌建立 GEO 基线，让内容可被 AI 答案引擎发现与引用，并给出有证据支撑的站内、站外行动方案。
sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not manipulation. Needs web access to crawl the brand's official site and cross-verify public sources (manifest diagnosis_basis: official-site-crawl-and-cross-verification). No bundled scripts; the agent generates the four-format (Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown) reports itself. Reads brand-supplied inputs and writes report files; default output language is Simplified Chinese.
sec_note_zh: 属白帽内容优化，非操纵。需要联网抓取品牌官网并交叉核验公开信源（manifest 诊断口径为 official-site-crawl-and-cross-verification）。不含打包脚本；四格式（Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown）报告由 agent 自行生成。读取用户提供的品牌资料、写出报告文件；默认输出语言为简体中文。
